title: Create Respawn
description: This project is a unique City-Build experience in Minecraft 1.21.1 built around the Create mod and over 300 carefully selected mods.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9947d1236fe8fe083b97f96c8c240902a84aad6.png)

**PROJECT ID: jW16Jrml**

🌆 Project Overview – Create CityBuild 1.21.1

This project is **a unique City-Build experience in Minecraft 1.21.1** built around the **Create mod and over 300 carefully selected mods.**

The goal is to bring back the classic **City-Build gameplay** everyone loved, but with a modern twist powered by automation, engineering, and creativity from the Create ecosystem.

🏙 What makes it special?
- **City-Build revival**: Players start at the central Spawn Plaza, surrounded by an unbuilt city.
- **Dynamic plots**: Claim and develop your own property in residential districts, shopping streets, or industrial zones.
- **Shops & economy**: Build your own shops and contribute to a living in-game economy right from day one.
- **Protected city**: The central city and walls are protected, so griefing is impossible.
- **Farm world**: A dedicated world outside the city for mega Create-machines, quarries, and farming.

⚙ Modded Gameplay
- **30+ Create Addons**: Massive expansion of automation, transport, and design possibilities.
- **ME-System & Storage Mods**: Advanced logistics and item management.
- **Decoration & Building Mods**: Detailed customization for houses, streets, and shops.
- **Utility Mods**: Quality of life improvements for both casual and technical players.

🎮 Playstyle
This project is designed for players who enjoy:
- Collaborative **city-building**
- **Automation & factories** with **Create**
- **Economic gameplay** with shops and trading
- A mix of **cozy community areas** and **technical mega-projects**
